parsed_review.summary: CP00-401 is a clean descriptor-only closeout pack covering the RP13.P04.M05 Permission And Audit Binding tail (7 rows) and the RP13.P04.M06 Synthetic Fixture Set head (3 rows), 10 units total. The pack does not over-claim: manifest production_ready=false, runtime_ready=false, status=implemented_pending_review, and the Hermes evidence packet emits only production_ready_candidate. Registry binding, closeout-pack-plan.json (pack at line 411), contract descriptor (line 10905), historical binding (line 11382), current_pack, README, the node:test suite, and scripts/validate-rp13-payments-core-contract.mjs are mutually consistent (pack_id CP00-401, risk A, 10 units, RP13.P04.M05.S16-RP13.P04.M06.S03; distribution fixture1/test1/hermes_evidence1/claude_review1/implementation3/ui3; micro counts M05:7 / M06:3). Descriptor and case-set generation (service.js freezeCp401Result, line 1178) is pure frozen-object construction with every runtime/write/leak flag false (synthetic_only, no_real_data, no audit/state/idempotency/workflow writes, no runtime permission eval, no Hermes runtime receipt, no object storage). Claude is held strictly read-only and explicitly not final approver (claude_is_final_approval=false, promotes_claude_to_final_approval=false); human approval is gated for runtime opening; Hermes H13 is used only as a deterministic evidence-packet descriptor, not product runtime. Readiness auth-preflight returned valid non-empty JSON (exit 0), and all pre-review validation gates in command-evidence.json exit 0. Two non-blocking P3 notes only; no P0/P1/P2 issues. The pack may proceed through the remaining hardening steps (normalize, receipt-validate, adjudication, construction-inspection, final closeout validation, commit).

findings.title: Post-review evidence artifacts and post-review gated commands not yet present (expected at this stage)
findings.details: manifest required_pack_artifacts/evidence_refs list claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, and construction-inspection.json, and the baseline validation_commands include closeout-pack:validate and git diff --check --cached, none of which exist/are recorded yet. This is expected and correct at the read_only_claude_run_raw_capture step (step 3 of the 9-step hardening_sequence): these artifacts are derived FROM this review and the post-review gated commands run before commit per command-evidence.json notes. Not a defect, but they MUST exist and pass before final closeout/commit.
findings.recommendation: Generate claude-review-result.json from the accepted review, then run finding_adjudication (adjudication.md), construction_inspection (construction-inspection.json), and the post-review gated validation commands (closeout-pack:validate, closeout-pack-plan:generate, git diff --check --cached) before committing CP00-401.
findings.post_review_disposition: Expected-by-design / non-blocking. Downstream hardening steps must produce these artifacts and command results prior to commit; closeout validation should reject if any are missing or invalid.

findings.title: changed-file-scope.json redundantly classifies the active pack's own evidence dir as an unrelated dirty file
findings.details: docs/closeout-packs/cp00-401/ (and docs/closeout-pack-plan/new-session-handoff.md) appear in BOTH untracked_implementation_files (lines 130-133) and unrelated_dirty_files_preserved (lines 135-145). The cp00-401/ directory is this pack's own evidence directory (it holds the manifest.json and command-evidence.json this review depends on), so labeling it 'unrelated' is contradictory. The authoritative manifest worktree_transition_policy.unrelated_dirty_files_preserved (manifest.json lines 548-556) correctly omits cp00-401/ and new-session-handoff.md, so pack integrity and scope are unaffected; this is cosmetic metadata redundancy in the helper scope file.
findings.recommendation: Fix the scope-emitter so an active-pack untracked implementation path (the pack's own docs/closeout-packs/<pack>/ dir) is not also emitted under unrelated_dirty_files_preserved; keep the two lists mutually exclusive.
findings.post_review_disposition: Non-blocking metadata cleanup for the closeout-pack scope tooling; does not affect CP00-401 boundaries, descriptor-only status, or production_ready accounting.
